mnemonics.title: Page Replacement Algorithms
mnemonics.content: FOLK: FIFO, Optimal, LRU, Clock - Key replacement strategies

mnemonics.title: Fragmentation Types
mnemonics.content: Internal In, External Out: Internal inside pages, External between segments

acronyms.usage: Hardware cache for fast address translation

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a book index where each topic (page) can be anywhere in the library (memory)
Picture a filing cabinet with different drawer sizes for various document types

analogies.analogy: Like a library's reserve system - keeps popular books (pages) handy, stores others in archives (disk)
Similar to missing ingredient while cooking - need to fetch from store (disk) before continuing
